name: hermesclawzero-memory
description: Long-term semantic memory server with pgvector + Ollama. Search, capture, graph traversal, episodic timeline, and memory management via MCP tools.

tools.name: search_memory
tools.description: Search long-term memory with hybrid vector+lexical scoring

tools.name: capture_memory
tools.description: Capture a new piece of information into long-term memory

tools.name: ask_question
tools.description: Ask a natural language question — searches vector + graph, synthesizes answer via LLM

tools.name: memory_feedback
tools.description: Rate a memory as helpful or not helpful

tools.name: graph_entities
tools.description: List top entities in the knowledge graph

tools.name: graph_search
tools.description: Search for a specific entity in the knowledge graph

tools.name: graph_traverse
tools.description: Traverse relationships from an entity

tools.name: graph_rag_search
tools.description: GraphRAG: search memories via entity graph traversal

tools.name: episodic_timeline
tools.description: Get episodic memory timeline

tools.name: record_episode
tools.description: Manually record an episodic memory

tools.name: memory_update
tools.description: Edit a stored memory's content and/or type

tools.name: memory_merge
tools.description: Merge multiple memories into one

tools.name: memory_nudge
tools.description: Get most important recent memories

tools.name: run_dedup
tools.description: Auto-merge duplicate or semantically similar memories

tools.name: run_tier_assignment
tools.description: Recalculate memory tiers

tools.name: run_reflection
tools.description: Analyze memories for contradictions

tools.name: run_optimizer
tools.description: Run full optimizer cycle

tools.name: dashboard_stats
tools.description: Get live dashboard statistics

tools.name: why_memory
tools.description: Bi-temporal explanation of a memory's history

tools.name: bi_timeline
tools.description: Bi-temporal timeline of all memory changes
